title: BeeEye
description: beeeye (Bi-eye) adds true stereo rendering to Minecraft by rendering separate left and right eye views — real 3D, side by side, SBS. And head tracking ofcourse!
body:
🐝 beeeye (Bi-eye) — True Stereo Rendering for Minecraft

stereo 3D rendering to Minecraft by rendering two independent camera views (left & right eye).

Minecraft is rendered twice — once per eye — producing actual stereoscopic vision suitable for stereo glasses and 3D displays.
